sqlMap.sql:
where u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and u.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId#
u.displayname like concat(concat('%', #searchStr#), '%')
u.description like concat(concat('%', #searchStr#), '%')
u.displayname2 like concat(concat('%', #searchStr#), '%')
u.description2 like concat(concat('%', #searchStr#), '%')

select u.cn as cn, case when #primary# = '1' then u.displayname else u.displayname2 end as display_name, u.department as department_id, case when #primary# = '1' THEN u.description else u.description2 end as department_name, u.physicaldeliveryofficename as company_id, case when #primary# = '1' then u.company else u.company2 end as company_name, case when w.capacity_value is not null then w.capacity_value else nvl(c.capacity_value, 0) end as total_capacity, case when w.capacity_type is not null then w.capacity_type else nvl(c.capacity_type, 1) end as capacity_tp, case when #primary# = '1' then u.title else u.title2 end as job_title, ( select nvl (sum(f.file_size), 0) from tbl_cb_attach_file f join tbl_cb_item i on f.item_id = i.item_id and f.tenant_id = i.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and i.creator_id = u.cn and i.use_status = 1 ) as total_used, u.tenant_id as tenant_id from tbl_usermaster u left join tbl_cb_user_capacity w on u.cn = w.user_id and u.physicaldeliveryofficename = w.company_id and u.tenant_id = w.tenant_id left join tbl_cb_company_capacity c on u.physicaldeliveryofficename = c.company_id and u.tenant_id = c.tenant_id
sqlMap.select: select * from tbl_cb_company_capacity where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: select 1 from dual where not exists (select tenant_id, company_id from tbl_cb_company_capacity where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_cb_company_capacity (company_id, capacity_type, capacity_value, tenant_id) values (#companyId#, #type#, #capacity#, #tenantId#)
insert.isNotEqual: update tbl_cb_company_capacity set capacity_type = #type#, capacity_value = #capacity# where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: where u.cn = #userId# and u.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# and u.tenant_id = #tenantId#

select * from ( select k.*, rownum as rnum from (
order by
COMPANY_NAME DEPARTMENT_NAME DISPLAY_NAME JOB_TITLE TOTAL_CAPACITY CAPACITY_TP desc,
department_name asc, display_name asc ) k where rownum <= #startPoint# + #listCnt# ) where rnum >= #startPoint# + 1

insert.selectKey: select 1 from dual where not exists (select tenant_id, user_id from tbl_cb_user_capacity where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_cb_user_capacity (user_id, capacity_type, capacity_value, company_id, tenant_id) values (#userId#, #capatype#, #capacity#, #companyId#, #tenantId#)
insert.isNotEqual: update tbl_cb_user_capacity set capacity_type = #capatype#, capacity_value = #capacity# where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_cb_user_capacity where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select * from tbl_cb_admin_module where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by module_type desc
sqlMap.update: update tbl_cb_admin_module set active_status = #activeStatus# where company_id = #companyId# and module_type = #moduleType# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
